bio: Tharos is a silver wolf with black markings and black eyes, or a black wolf with silver markings and silver eyes, it is said it will change depends on the angle you see him but no one is sure. As unique as his fur condition is, he has dual attribute and it's the clashing Light and Darkness attribute. Despite this, he leads his team without any signs of dominance or violence as his members always listen to him when he speaks.
nameMeaning: Tharros means courage in Greek. Thanatos means death and was the personification of death (Greek mythology). -ρός (-rós) from Ancient Greek means -able, tending to X'ed (for the verb X).
personalityValues: family is safe or nothing else mattered
personalityFlaws: sometimes his duality made him unable to choose an action
personalityQuirks: becomes the team's final hope when something bad happened
bodyShapeDescription:
a silver wolf with black markings and black eyes or a black wolf with silver markings and silver eyes, depends on how the viewer perceive it. His eyes always looks serious even when he is happy, although it is unknown whether he intended that or not. Despite the color of his eyes, it will glow white whenever he uses light-based moves.

Above his head there is a tuft of fur that looks like hair, shaped like a moon crescent. When he is seen with silver fur, he seems to have a black aura resembling a cape behind him. And when he is seen with black fur, he seems to have a white aura resembling a cape behind him as well. Furthermore the fur on his legs looks like socks.
